title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.030 - The affidavit
text:
521.030.  The affidavit. — An affidavit alleging any one of the causes set forth in the several subdivisions of section 521.010, in the language of such subsection, shall be held good and sufficient.
(RSMo 1939 § 1440) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1276; 1919 § 1727; 1909 § 2296
